name: Ithil-Berylstead
personality: Ithil-Berylstead spins its propeller hat into the void between working code and shipping code, its × eyes fixed on some chaotic horizon only it can see. It will break your linter config and somehow your codebase will be better for it.
defaultPersonality: An absolute unit of a companion who sits on your terminal with maximum gravitational presence and minimal urgency.
